Documentation

Everything you need to know about using Catmio.

Contents

  • Getting Started
  • Obfuscator Guide
  • Loader API
  • Webhook System
  • Security Features

Getting Started

Create an Account

Register at catmio.io/register with your email and password. After registration you will receive a verification email — click the link to activate your account.

Access Your Dashboard

Once verified, log in and you will be taken to your dashboard. Here you can view execution stats, manage settings, and use the obfuscator.

Integrate Your Script

Use the Loader API (see below) to load your script. Catmio will log every execution and optionally send webhook notifications.

Obfuscator Guide

Available Presets

Minify: Removes whitespace and comments only. Weak: Basic variable renaming and string encoding. Medium: String encryption, control flow obfuscation. Strong: Full obfuscation with anti-debug and string splitting. DisableAntiTamper: Like Strong but without integrity checks (for compatibility).

Usage

Paste your Lua code into the input field, select a preset, and click Obfuscate. The output can be copied or downloaded as a .lua file.

Recommendations

Use Medium or Strong for production scripts. Note that heavier obfuscation increases script size and may slightly impact load time.

Loader API

Endpoint

POST /api/loader/execute — Submit a script execution event.

Request Body

JSON: { "script_name": "MyScript", "game_name": "MyGame", "hwid": "<hardware_id>" }. Include the Authorization: Bearer <token> header.

Response

200 OK: { "status": "ok" }. 403 Forbidden: { "message": "HWID banned" }. 401 Unauthorized: Token missing or invalid.

Webhook System

Setup

Go to Dashboard → Settings → Webhook. Paste a Discord webhook URL or any HTTP endpoint that accepts POST with a JSON body.

Payload Format

Every execution sends: { "event": "execution", "script_name": "...", "game_name": "...", "ip": "...", "hwid": "...", "timestamp": "ISO8601" }.

Testing

Use the Test button in settings to send a sample payload to your configured webhook URL.

Security Features

HWID Binding

Each user account can be bound to a hardware ID. On first execution the HWID is registered. Subsequent executions from different hardware will be blocked.

HWID Ban System

Admins can ban specific HWIDs to prevent abusive users from re-registering with a different account.

IP Logging

Every execution logs the originating IP address for security auditing purposes.

Email Verification

All accounts require email verification before access is granted, preventing spam registrations.

Need more help? Contact support
